name: Pro Medicus Limited
analysis: PME's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 45% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$174.1400. Trade idea: entry A$185.3900, stop A$158.6178, target A$265.7066 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
